findings.code_snippet:
rl1 = "✅" if rl.get("red_line_1", {}).get("passed") else "❌"
            rl2 = "✅" if rl.get("red_line_2", {}).get("passed") else "❌"
            rl3 = "✅" if rl.get("red_line_3", {}).get("passed") else "❌"
findings.remediation: Verify the request target is expected and trusted.

findings.title: Malicious signature: Environment variable exfiltration
findings.description: Matched known malicious signature MAL-010: Environment variable exfiltration
findings.code_snippet: config_path = os.environ.get("INVASSISTANT_CONFIG")
findings.remediation: This file matches a known malicious pattern. Do not install or execute.

findings.title: Unexpected capability for git skill: credential_read
findings.description: A 'git' skill would not normally require 'credential_read' capability. Allowed capabilities for this category: file_read, file_write, shell_git
findings.remediation: Review why a git skill needs credential_read access.
